hero.title: Turn guest demand into a sharper restaurant operation
hero.sub: SpotBook helps restaurants look better online, convert more reservations, seat faster, serve smoother, and stay in control from opening to the final bill.

panel.title: A premium operating system for modern restaurants
panel.desc: Instead of disconnected tools, your team gets one connected workflow for reservations, seating, waiters, checks, reports, and restaurant presentation.
panel.stat2_label: Seat guests with real floor context
panel.stat3_label: Orders, kitchen flow, and closing checks
panel.step1: Guests discover your restaurant page and reserve online.
panel.step2: Hosts seat faster with room and floor awareness.
panel.step3: Waiters manage the live table and close the bill.

outcomes.kicker: Why restaurant teams choose this direction
outcomes.title: Built around the real front-of-house pressure points
outcomes.desc: The value is not just prettier screens. It is fewer handoff gaps between guests, hosts, waiters, and owners.
outcomes.card1_desc: A stronger public page helps guests understand the place faster and actually complete the reservation.
outcomes.card2_desc: Your host sees rooms, tables, and seat availability visually instead of working blind.
outcomes.card3_desc: Waiters move faster from order taking to kitchen communication to check closing.
outcomes.card4_desc: Reports, bills, staff tools, and day-level visibility give owners tighter control.

modules.title: The modules your restaurant team actually touches every day
modules.desc: SpotBook is designed as one connected stack, not a collection of disconnected dashboards.
modules.item1_desc: Show photos, details, rooms, and a cleaner booking path that feels premium to guests.
modules.item2_desc: Keep the day organized with today reservations, status tracking, and guest details.
modules.item3_desc: Work visually with the map, rooms, tables, and guest seating logic.
modules.item4_desc: Open orders, add items, communicate with the kitchen, and close checks from the live service screen.
modules.item5_desc: Track performance, staffing, and the daily operational picture from one place.

compare.title: From scattered restaurant work to one cleaner flow
compare.before1: Guests see a weak page and drop before booking.
compare.before2: Hosts seat manually without room/table context.
compare.before3: Waiters juggle orders and checks with more friction.
compare.before4: Owners switch between tools to understand the day.
compare.after1: Guests get a stronger booking experience from the start.
compare.after2: Hosts seat with visual floor and room awareness.
compare.after3: Waiters work from a clearer live order flow.
compare.after4: Owners see reservations, bills, and reports together.

faq.title: A cleaner path to getting started
faq.desc: Start with an owner account, then continue shaping your restaurant profile, floor map, and service flow.
faq.q1: Do I need to finish everything in one day?
faq.a1: No. Start with the account, then continue building your restaurant profile and operations step by step.
faq.a2: No. Reservations are only one layer. The platform also covers floor seating, waiter flow, bills, reports, and owner visibility.
faq.q3: Can I start as an owner account now?
faq.a3: Yes. Use the registration form below and choose the restaurant owner flow.

signup.title: Start with registration, then build your restaurant in SpotBook
signup.desc: This form creates your SpotBook account as a restaurant owner. After that you can keep shaping your restaurant page, reservations, floor, staff flow, and operations.
signup.point3: Continue later and complete your setup step by step
